name: flywheel
description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts, run now via /goal or droid exec, or queued in docs/goals), dispatch (sequential single-session orchestrator that drains the docs/goals queue on the current branch behind a local build+test gate), loop-architect (design autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor).
